meta.title: Our Team
meta.description: Meet the advisors at Hargrove Wealth Advisory — CFP®, CFA, and CPA professionals who carry small books so they can do deep work for each client.

hero.heading: Meet Our Team.
hero.lede: Four advisors. Decades of combined experience. One philosophy: small books, deep work, and a real relationship with every client.

members.name: Robert Hargrove, CFP®, CFA
members.title: Founding Partner
members.bio: 25 years of experience. Specializes in estate and retirement planning for executives and multi-generational families. Wharton MBA. Outside the office, you'll find him fly fishing in Montana or coaching his daughter's youth soccer team.

members.name: Sarah Whitfield, CFP®
members.title: Partner, Wealth Management
members.bio: 18 years of experience. Focuses on women navigating life transitions — divorce, widowhood, inheritance, business sale. CFA Institute member. An avid marathon runner with seven majors completed and one to go.

members.name: David Kim, CPA, CFP®
members.title: Director of Tax Strategy
members.bio: 12 years of experience. Former Big 4 tax consultant. Specializes in business owners, real estate investors, and clients with complex multi-state tax pictures. Georgetown Law background. Quiet, methodical, and unusually fast with a spreadsheet.

members.name: Aisha Osei, CFP®
members.title: Associate Advisor
members.bio: 6 years of experience. Our NextGen planning specialist — works with clients aged 30 to 50 on wealth accumulation, equity comp, and early-career planning. First-generation wealth builder herself, which makes her a particularly empathetic guide for clients in the same position.

cta.heading: Want to know who you'd be working with?
cta.description: Every initial conversation is with a partner — not an intake coordinator.
